intro: An electric wire-rope traction hoist for suspended access platforms and material lifting. The α-shaped rope path drives the rope through the machine instead of winding it on a drum, so platform height is limited only by the rope you deploy — from a two-point swing stage to a full façade rig.

points.title: Man-riding certified
points.line: Designed and certified to UL 1323, CSA Z271 and EN 1808 for lifting people on suspended platforms, with all safety devices built in.
Three models, one platform. Single or three-phase, 208 V / 60 Hz.

points.title: Integrated OSLA brake
points.line: Independent overspeed safety lock, factory-fitted. The hoist cannot run without it.
